commit.message:
Add systematic JDK syntax compatibility tests (#141)

Add JdkSyntaxCompatibilityTest with 208 tests covering every syntax
feature documented in the JDK 21 Pattern Javadoc. 183 tests pass,
25 are @Disabled with links to filed issues (#133-#140).

Bug classes found:
- #133: \uhhhh unicode escapes not supported
- #134: (?d), (?u) inline flags not recognized
- #135: Nested repetition limit too strict
- #136: Unicode property names not underscore-insensitive
- #137: \b{g} grapheme cluster boundary not supported
- #138: \0mnn three-digit octal parsed incorrectly
- #139: Character class intersection/subtraction (&&) wrong results
- #140: Surrogate pair ranges in character classes rejected

Also update AGENTS.md with TDD bug-fixing philosophy: when fixing a
bug, first ask why there is no test coverage for the class of things,
write systematic tests first, then fix the code.

Refs #127, #131

commit.message:
[GLUTEN-11550][UT] Add GlutenTestSetWithSystemPropertyTrait, enable 6 suites, remove 7 TestHiveSingleton suites, fix JobTagging flaky test (#11847)

* [GLUTEN-11550][UT] Add GlutenTestSetWithSystemPropertyTrait and enable 6 suites

Add a reusable trait for test suites whose parent creates per-test
SparkContext/SparkSession (via LocalSparkContext/LocalSparkSession).
It injects GlutenPlugin config via system properties so per-test
sessions inherit it, avoiding shared session conflicts.

Enable 6 suites by switching to this trait:
- GlutenSQLExecutionSuite (SQLExecutionSuite: new SparkContext internally)
- GlutenSQLJsonProtocolSuite (SQLJsonProtocolSuite with LocalSparkSession)
- GlutenShufflePartitionsUtilSuite (ShufflePartitionsUtilSuite with LocalSparkContext)
- GlutenExternalAppendOnlyUnsafeRowArraySuite (with LocalSparkContext)
- GlutenUnsafeRowSerializerSuite (UnsafeRowSerializerSuite with LocalSparkSession)
- GlutenSparkSessionJobTaggingAndCancellationSuite (with LocalSparkContext)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* [GLUTEN-11550][UT] Remove TestHiveSingleton suites that cannot load GlutenPlugin

Remove 7 test suites (spark40 + spark41) that extend TestHiveSingleton.
TestHiveSingleton.spark (protected val) conflicts with Gluten test traits'
spark (implicit protected def), making it impossible to load GlutenPlugin.

The non-Hive variants (e.g. GlutenBucketedReadWithoutHiveSupportSuite)
are already enabled and cover the same functionality.

Removed suites:
- GlutenBucketedReadWithHiveSupportSuite
- GlutenBucketedWriteWithHiveSupportSuite
- GlutenDisableUnnecessaryBucketedScanWithHiveSupportSuite
- GlutenCommitFailureTestRelationSuite
- GlutenJsonHadoopFsRelationSuite
- GlutenParquetHadoopFsRelationSuite
- GlutenSimpleTextHadoopFsRelationSuite

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* [GLUTEN-11550][UT] Fix JobTagging flaky test with fresh thread pool

The original test uses ExecutionContext.global whose ForkJoinPool reuses
threads created long before addTag(). InheritableThreadLocal (used by
managedJobTags) only copies values at thread creation time, so reused
threads see an empty tag map. This causes withSessionTagsApplied to not
attach the user tag to the job, making cancelJobsWithTagWithFuture
return empty.

Fix: testGluten override that creates a fresh SingleThreadExecutor AFTER
addTag(), ensuring the new thread inherits InheritableThreadLocal values.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Split global resource control into scoped controllers

Implement six scoped resource controllers to replace global shared state:

1. Per-peer inbound rate limiting (overlay)
   - TrafficClass enum with 4 classes + SCP exempt
   - PeerRateLimiter with per-class sub-budgets and global aggregate
   - FloodGate global backstop raised to 5000/s

2. Per-peerID connection slot dedup (overlay)
   - PendingConnections with by_address and by_peer_id DashMaps
   - Integrated into all connection establishment paths
   - Stale sweep in tick loop (30s timeout)

3. Dedicated query runtime (app)
   - QueryServer spawned on separate Tokio multi-thread runtime
   - Configured via query.thread_pool_size

4. Meta stream blocking I/O isolation (app)
   - MetaWriter with bounded mpsc channel (cap 16) + dedicated thread
   - Async write for live close, blocking write for catchup
   - Fatal errors set AtomicBool + abort

5. Bounded hot-archive merge (bucket)
   - Replaced HashMap + sort with O(n+m) sorted merge-join
   - O(1) extra memory per entry

6. Seeded validation context at startup (app/herder)
   - seed_validation_context() reads LCL header + Soroban config
   - Called from load_last_known_ledger and bootstrap_from_db
   - Sets soroban_limits and dynamic resource limits immediately

Closes #1223

commit.message:
[improvement](fe) Enhance COALESCE simplification to remove all NullLiterals (#62266)

The existing COALESCE simplification rule in SimplifyConditionalFunction
only removed leading NullLiteral arguments. When a nullable
non-NullLiteral argument was encountered, all remaining arguments
(including trailing/interleaved NullLiterals) were preserved.
Additionally, an early exit prevented any simplification when the first
argument was a nullable non-NullLiteral.

For example, `coalesce(null, null, ..., null, i1, null)` was simplified
to `coalesce(i1, null)` instead of just `i1`.

The improved algorithm:
1. Skips ALL NullLiteral arguments (not just leading ones)
2. Truncates at the first non-nullable argument (subsequent args are
unreachable)
3. Returns the single remaining expression directly when only one is
left

### Release note

Improved COALESCE expression simplification to remove all NULL literal
arguments and truncate unreachable arguments after the first
non-nullable expression.

### Check List (For Author)

- Test: Unit Test
- Behavior changed: No
- Does this need documentation: No

Fix: Expand .vercelignore to prevent large files in serverless functions

Previous deployment failed because serverless function exceeded 300 MB limit.
The analyses/ck-subterms.rsc function was 325.69 MB, bundling unnecessary
data files that aren't needed at runtime.

Excluded from Vercel deployment:
- data/ (ERA5 NetCDF files, case metadata, etc.)
- public/figures/ (composite figures, all served locally or from storage)
- public/docs/ (PDF documentation)
- scripts/ (Python analysis scripts)
- results/ (local results)
- logs/ (local logs)
- docs/legacy/ (legacy documentation)

These files are needed for local development and remote analysis but not
for the web server runtime.

[development-frontend-dev-c201] Implement animations (page transitions, state changes, loading)

TASK-173: Add comprehensive animation system including:
- Design tokens (animations.json) with duration, easing, page transition,
  state change, loading, and stagger presets
- CSS variables and keyframes (animation-variables.css) with utility classes
  and reduced-motion support
- Tailwind theme extension (animation-theme.ts)
- React components: FadeIn, SlideIn, ScaleIn, PageTransition,
  AnimatePresence, Skeleton, Shimmer, PulseLoader, StaggerList
- useAnimation hook for programmatic animation lifecycle control
- 77 tests across component, hook, and design token QA tests
